label: satisfied

meta.business_goal: Cover Decision + Generation System dataset calibration

image_level_observations.visual_hierarchy: 先看到两位人物和问号，再看到主标题，最后读取栏目标签、品牌和开播时间。

reusable_prompt_signals: two adults in office discussion at desk
dark purple blue AI technology background
glowing white rim light around people
large floating question marks above conversation
bold oversized Chinese headline area in lower half
white heavy title text with dark shadow
small rounded label badge near title
subtle code UI text and tech frame in background
clear livestream date and time at bottom
high contrast short video cover style
risk_notes: 复杂中文文字不应依赖图像生成模型一次性生成，建议后期手工排版。
人物不要被描述或处理成可识别真实身份。
强发光描边需要适度，避免产生粗糙抠图感。
底部时间信息在小缩略图中可能变弱，需要做移动端预览。
背景科技元素应保持低权重，避免抢占标题可读性。
